title: Dona Flor and Her Two Husbands
original_title: Dona Flor e Seus Dois Maridos
overview: After the death of her handsome but good-for-nothing husband Vadinho, Flor, a widow, marries Dr. Teodoro, a respectable gentleman. Hilarity ensues when Vadinho's spirit returns into her life.
